The radius of the base of a right circular cone is 1. The vertex of the cone is
$V$, and $P$ is a point on the circumference of the base. The length of $PV$ is
6 and the midpoint of $PV$ is $M$. A piece of string is attached to $M$ and
wound tightly twice round the cone finishing at $P$. What is the length of the
string?
